nasb.text: So afterward Joshua struck them and put them to death, and he hanged them on five trees; and they hung on the trees until evening.

esv.text: And afterward Joshua struck them and put them to death, and he hanged them on five trees. And they hung on the trees until evening.

cnv.text: 隨後，約書亞把那五個王殺死，懸在五棵樹上；他們就懸在樹上，直到晚上。

ccb.text: 随后约书亚将这五个王杀死，把尸体分别挂在五棵树上，直到傍晚。
